# Industry Module Index

Use this index to identify the correct industry module based on signals in the documents.

## Industry Signal Table

| Signals in Documents | Module File |
|---------------------|-------------|
| ARR, MRR, NRR, GRR, churn, seats, logos, subscription, per-seat, SaaS, cloud, recurring, cohort, CAC, LTV, payback, bookings, billings, RPO, deferred revenue | `saas.md` |
| NIM, NII, deposits, loan portfolio, NCOs, originations, yield, cost of funds, CECL, ACL, delinquency, charge-offs, warehouse, securitization | `banking-lending.md` |
| Combined ratio, loss ratio, expense ratio, premium, claims, reserves, underwriting, reinsurance, loss development, IBNR, policyholder | `insurance.md` |
| Loads, lanes, OR (operating ratio), freight, warehouse, fleet, miles, RPM, deadhead, brokerage, TMS, WMS, capacity, shipper | `transportation-logistics.md` |
| NOI, occupancy, rent roll, cap rate, WIP, POC, overbillings, underbillings, retention, backlog, bonding, GC, subcontractor | `real-estate-construction.md` |
| Utilization, bill rate, headcount, project hours, billable, consultants, engagements, backlog, realization, leverage ratio | `business-services.md` |
| Route, stops, uniform, rental, laundry, facility services, mats, mops, towels, in-service inventory, stop economics, route density, service frequency | `business-services.md` (adapt for route-based services) |
| Visits, encounters, wRVUs, payor mix, NPSR, reimbursement, denials, collections, Medicare, Medicaid, managed care, credentialing, census | `healthcare-services.md` |
| Same-store sales, comps, SSS, AOV, basket, turns, inventory, SKUs, traffic, conversion, unit economics, store count, e-commerce mix | `retail-consumer.md` |
| OEE, throughput, BOM, backlog, book-to-bill, yield, scrap, capacity utilization, COGS, direct labor, make vs buy, lead time | `industrial-manufacturing.md` |
| Semiconductor, fabless, wafer, foundry, packaging, GPU, accelerator, HBM, CoWoS, chip, silicon, ASP, units shipped, design wins, tape-out | `industrial-manufacturing.md` (adapt for semiconductors) |
| AUM, net flows, fee rate, carry, management fee, performance fee, incentive fee, fund, LP, GP, vintage, committed capital, dry powder | `asset-management.md` |

## How to Use

1. Scan uploaded documents for these signals
2. Match to the most likely module
3. LOAD the corresponding module file for full guidance

## Module Contents

Each module contains:
- **Industry Identification** — Keywords to confirm the match
- **KPIs That Matter** — Key metrics with definitions and why they matter
- **Value Driver Trees** — EBITDA, Working Capital, and Capex breakdowns
- **Red Flags** — Warning signs in CIM and data room
- **Standard Analyses** — What to build and data required
- **Data Requests** — High/Medium/Low prioritized asks
- **Common EBITDA Adjustments** — Typical M&A adjustments for the industry
- **Accounting Watch-Outs** — Areas requiring scrutiny
- **External Research Topics** — What to search for

## If No Module Fits

Use the closest module and adapt. Supplement with general KPIs:
- Revenue growth (YoY, CAGR)
- Gross margin and EBITDA margin
- Customer/revenue concentration
- Working capital cycle (DSO, DPO, DIO)
- Capex intensity (maintenance vs growth)
